title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: CRAP!! He used it against us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah!! aim me right at his stomach!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I forget sometimes, but that's really luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't stop, Oz!! He's still breathing.
